title: Combat Utilities
description: Configurable settings for many values related to combat. Armor modifiers, attack cooldowns, crit multiplier, and much much more.
body:
[Combat Utilities](https://modrinth.com/mod/combat-utilities) gives you control over many values related to Combat.
All configuration options are stored in `combat_utilities.properties` in the config folder.

## Commands
All commands require Operator permissions.
+ `/combatUtils listall`
  + Lists all configuration options and their current values

+ `/combatUtils set [key] [value]`
  + Sets a configuration option to the desired value

+ `/combatUtils reset [key]`
  + Reset a configuration option to the default value

For more information on individual configuration options, see the [wiki](https://github.com/AtticusHelvig/CombatUtils/wiki).
